author: design-phase-1b-style-md-c138
content: Completed: Implemented vitreous_style crate with all typed styling, theming, and animation primitives. 7 source files (color.rs, font.rs, dimension.rs, animation.rs, style.rs, theme.rs, lib.rs), 58 passing tests, zero external dependencies. All acceptance criteria met including WCAG AA contrast ratios. Clippy and fmt clean.
